.file-embed.background: rgb(22, 22, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(38, 38, 38) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.workspace-leaf-content.background: rgb(22, 22, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(38, 38, 38) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(38, 38, 38) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.callout-content.background: rgb(22, 22, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.callout-title.background: rgba(2, 122, 255, 0.2) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-active.is-clickable.nav-file-titl.background: rgb(108, 65, 216) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(38, 38, 38) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(38, 38, 38) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input.task-list-item-checkbox[data-line=.background: rgb(59, 59, 59) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(22, 22, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgb(108, 65, 216) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(22, 22, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(22, 22, 22) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
